name: SlackOff Defense
desc: Build screen turrets, dodge your boss, and survive 8 inspection waves in this office tower defense game!

name: Abyss Chef
desc: Play as Ollie the octopus chef! Fish deep sea creatures, cook meals, and build your underwater restaurant!

name: Cloud & Sheep
desc: Care for adorable sheep! Drag clouds to make rain, grow grass, and keep your fluffy flock happy!

name: Cookie Clicker
desc: Bake billions of cookies in this free online idle clicker game! Click the cookie, buy buildings, unlock upgrades, click golden cookies for bonuses, and prestige for permanent rewards. The ultimate baking empire!
